baseImage.prompt: A fictional original K-pop solo idol named Mina Rae backstage before a music-video shoot, pearl pink and chrome beauty lighting, holding a small frosted Lumora glow serum bottle with no readable label, polished warm aura, direct eye contact, camera-ready dewy skin, soft vanity bulbs and chrome fixtures, realistic beauty campaign still, 9:16 vertical composition, no real person likeness, no celebrity resemblance, no logos, no readable text, no watermark.

music.prompt: Sparkly K-pop dance-pop beauty ad hook for fictional five-member idol group LUMINA, glossy pearl pink and chrome mood, bright synth stabs, tight pop drums, playful bass, polished female idol vocals, catchy 15-second chorus, TikTok beauty campaign energy, confident but warm, camera-ready glow, 124 BPM.
music.lyrics:
[Hook]
Lights on, glow up, LUMINA
Lumora shine before the stage
Dewy, dewy, banjjak hae
Camera loves us every day

[Post Chorus]
Glow with me, Lumora
Glow with LUMINA
music.rationale: The short hook is written before video generation so LUMINA's member lanes, visual palette, and Seedance storyboards can all orbit the same sonic identity.

storyboard.title: Mina Rae Lumora 15s K-pop Beauty Hook
storyboard.prompt: @Image1 is Mina Rae, a fictional original K-pop solo idol. Use @Audio1 as the music-video soundtrack and match the cuts to the hook energy. 0.0-3.0s: backstage pearl pink chrome vanity intro, Mina Rae looks into the mirror, hand near Lumora serum, soft handheld beauty-ad camera. 3.0-6.0s: cut to close-up as she picks up the frosted serum bottle and taps glow onto one cheek, camera-ready dewy finish, no readable label. 6.0-10.5s: cut to music-video performance beat, she steps toward stage light and hits one simple chorus pose, warm polished confidence, not frantic. 10.5-13.0s: cut to macro product-in-hand beauty shot with chrome reflections and pearl pink light. 13.0-15.0s: final close shot, Mina Rae glances into camera as the hook says Lumora. Preserve the same fictional idol identity across every scene. No real celebrity likeness, no logos, no readable text, no captions, no clinical skincare claims.
